verse_text: And the smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, ascended before God from the angel's hand.

pericope.title: Seal Seven: Prelude to the Trumpets

links.context: The dawning of the eternal day of the Lord will mean that the shadows of sin and death will depart from us forever (see [[REV.21:3]]-5). The mountain of myrrh is likely a reference to the fragrance of God's eternal Kingdom and the presence there of holy incense ([[REV.8:3]], [[REV.8:4]]).
